chapter_title.ar: بَابُ وَدَاعِ قَبْرِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 222 – Bidding farewell to the grave of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/277)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ وَدَاعِ قَبْرِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ تَقُولُ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ لَا جَعَلَهُ اللَّهُ آخِرَ تَسْلِيمِي عَلَيْكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about bidding farewell to the grave of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You should be saying, ‘May the Blessings of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> be upon you<sup>saww</sup>. The greetings be upon you<sup>saww</sup>. May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> not Make it to be the last of my greetings upon you<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about how to say farewell to the grave of the Holy prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause. He (the Imam) replied, say, ‘I pray to Allah to grant you compensation worthy of Your services to His cause. I appeal before Allah not to make this my last salutation to you.’”
